title: Betulinic Acid in Gastrointestinal Cancers: Mechanistic Prioritization, Nano-Enabled Delivery, and Translational Barriers.
snippet: Gastrointestinal (GI) cancers are one of the leading causes of cancer death in the world. Since it is often not diagnosed early, it typically becomes resistant to chemotherapy, and genetic alterations in tumors are associated with metabolic remodeling, inflammatory reactions, and immunological evasion. Systemic therapies have improved yet sustained response...
